title: 戴伟浚(浚狗)條撚樣不入狼隊季前亞洲集訓名單

replies.msg:
Taylor Perry, Luke Cundle, Niall Ennis and Ed Francis are amongst the under-18 and under-23 players given the nod for the trip to Shanghai and Nanjing.

Wolves’ Asia tour squad in full
